rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE MARY L. MCFADDEN SURVIVOR'S TRUST, ESTABLISHED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (6096 & 6075 Austin Creek Rd. Cazadero, Ca 95421)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following procedural issues remain: 1) The trustee did not mail notice of hearing to the interested parties or the buyers. 2)The inventory and appraisal is captioned as a reappraisal for sale, but it appears to have a date of death value (April 1, 2023). For the court to approve the sale, an inventory and appraisal must be filed with an updated appraisal date (Probate Code Section 10309(b)(3) and LRSF 14.32.A). 3) Commission is 6%. The Court will ordinarily allow brokers' commissions in a total amount not to exceed 5% of the sale price (LRSF 14.33.A). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KAREN LEE BEASON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/14/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) The petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed to each distributee, the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) to be distributed to each beneficiary (LRSF 14.35.I.6.a). 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (LRSF 14.7.A). Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 04/01/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIBBY LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 31, 2003, AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order To Compel Distribution; 3) Order For Damages And Attorney’S Fees Under Probate Code
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/13/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) Clare Eleanor Loops did not receive notice of the instant petition (Probate Code Section 17203). The instant petition indicates that she requested her address be withheld, but no statement confirming this request is attached the petition, and no waiver of notice is on file with the court. 2) The instant petition requests removal of the trustee and for the court to appoint a neutral professional as successor trustee, but no potential successor trustee is named and no potential successor trustee has filed an acceptance to act. Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings and a proposed order to this examiner no later than 04/29/2026 to avoid additional continuance.
